hero.badge: Referenced from ASPCA · AAFCO · FEDIAF Pet Nutrition Frameworks
hero.title: Create Custom Recipes
hero.subtitle: AI-powered nutritionally complete recipes for dogs and cats, referenced against international pet nutrition frameworks. Suitable for pets with health conditions.
hero.freeNote: ✓ No credit card needed · 1 free recipe · No signup required

features.f1Desc: Enter your pet's breed, age, weight and health conditions. AI generates complete recipes instantly, validated against AAFCO standards in real-time.
features.f2Desc: Based on ASPCA toxic food list, 60+ toxic ingredients filtered in real-time. Immediate alert when onion, grapes, xylitol detected.
features.f3Desc: Kidney disease, pancreatitis, diabetes... AI adjusts protein, phosphorus, fat ratios. Nutritional reference only — use under veterinary guidance.
features.f4Desc: Missing an ingredient? AI instantly suggests nutritionally equivalent alternatives and recalculates all nutrition metrics.
features.f5Desc: Track your pet's monthly dietary history. Export PDF to share with your vet (uses free credits).
features.f6Desc: 60+ ingredient safety database. No login required. Instant alerts for dangerous ingredients. Completely free.

recipe.sectionTitle: Generate a Complete Recipe in 30 Seconds
recipe.sectionSubtitle: Select your pet's info, AI instantly generates a home-cooked recipe reference based on the AAFCO nutritional framework
recipe.disclaimer: This recipe is AI-generated, designed based on the AAFCO nutritional framework, for home-cooked food reference only. It does not constitute a complete balanced diet and does not replace professional veterinary advice. Consult a veterinary nutritionist before using as a sole long-term diet.
recipe.premixHintDog: 💡 For long-term use as a main diet, consider adding a dog-specific vitamin & mineral supplement (containing zinc, copper, iodine, vitamin E, etc.) per product instructions
recipe.premixHintCat: 💡 For long-term use as a main diet, consider adding a cat-specific vitamin & mineral supplement (containing zinc, copper, iodine, vitamin E, etc.) per product instructions
recipe.proMonthUsage: 👑 Pro Member · Used {used}/20 this month (recipes + substitutions)
recipe.proExpiringSoon: ⚠️ Membership expires in {days} days — renew soon
recipe.noCreditsMsg: AI credits insufficient. Please purchase a credits pack or subscribe to Pro.
recipe.sickPetDisclaimer: ⚕️ Health Condition Reference Mode: The following recipe is nutritional reference information only, not medical advice. Please use under the guidance of a licensed veterinarian.
recipe.freeRecipeNote: Free recipe from our database · Upgrade for personalized AI recipes
recipe.upgradeHint: 🟠 Upgrade to Pro or purchase AI credits for personalized recipes based on your pet's exact profile
recipe.guestFreeAvailable: 🎁 1 free AI recipe · No signup needed
recipe.signupForMore: Sign up for 1 more free recipe →
recipe.weightErrorTooLow: Pets this light are usually still nursing. Please consult a vet before introducing solid food.
recipe.weightErrorTooHigh: Please double-check the weight you entered.
recipe.weightHintCatOverweight: This weight seems high. If your cat is overweight, please select the 'Obesity' health condition for a more accurate recipe.
recipe.standardNote: ⚡ Standard · Subscribe to Pro for more diverse, personalized recipes
recipe.creditsUsed: Your AI credits are used up.
recipe.monthlyQuotaUsed: Monthly quota reached. Purchase credits to continue.
recipe.disclaimer_short: ⚕ AI-generated recipe based on AAFCO nutritional framework, for home-cooked food reference only. Not a substitute for veterinary advice.
recipe.disclaimer_full: All recipes are AI-generated based on the AAFCO nutritional framework, for home-cooked food reference only. They do not constitute a complete balanced diet plan and do not replace professional veterinary advice. Consult a veterinary nutritionist before using as a sole long-term diet.
recipe.calories_warning: ⚠️ Current calories ({actual} kcal) are outside the target range {min}–{max} kcal. Please adjust ingredient amounts.
recipe.generateError: Generation failed. Please try again later.
recipe.aafcoDetailsTitle: ▸ AAFCO key macro-nutrient comparison (normalized per 1000 kcal)
recipe.aafcoDetailsHint: Note: values shown are g (or mg) per 1000 kcal — the AAFCO comparison basis. This panel covers key macronutrients and essential macro-minerals only. A complete AAFCO Complete & Balanced certification additionally requires verification of vitamins (A/D/E/K/B-complex) and trace minerals (iron, zinc, copper, iodine, selenium, etc.), which are beyond home-cooking self-assessment. For long-term sole feeding, add a multivitamin & mineral supplement.
recipe.organNote: Organ meat (liver, heart, etc.) is rich in Vitamin A, B12 and iron — recommended at 5–10% of total food, not more
recipe.pancreatitisNote: Low-fat mode active: fat is strictly controlled within AAFCO safety limits to prevent pancreatitis relapse

error.forbidden_ingredient: ⚠️ Some ingredients were adjusted due to health condition restrictions
error.nutrition_failure: 🚨 Recipe nutrition does not meet standards. Please regenerate.

warning.ingredient_removed: ⚠️ {name} was removed from the recipe due to health restrictions

safety.title: Any Ingredient, Safe or Not in 3 Seconds
safety.subtitle: No login required. Based on official ASPCA toxic food database. Returns safety level instantly.
safety.caution: ● Caution · Limit quantity or remove specific parts
safety.unknownMsg: No record for "{name}" in database. Please check ASPCA official website or consult a licensed vet before feeding.

label.partial_cat_kitten: △ Partially based on AAFCO nutritional framework (Kitten)

label.non-compliant_cat_adult: ⚠ Below AAFCO nutritional framework reference (Adult Cat)

reason.calcium_deficiency: Auto-added by AI · Purest calcium source with no side effects
reason.omega3_deficiency: Auto-added by AI · EPA+DHA supports coat health and joint mobility
reason.fat_and_omega3_deficiency: Auto-added by AI · Supports healthy skin and coat in one step
reason.taurine_deficiency: Auto-added by AI · Essential nutrient for cats, supports heart and vision
reason.phosphorus_deficiency: Auto-added by AI · Dicalcium phosphate (DCP), Ca:P ≈ 1.2, AAFCO-approved phosphorus source

suitable.nutrition_critical_warning: ⚠️ This recipe does not meet protein or fat targets — treat as an occasional reference, not for long-term sole feeding

condition.disclaimer: This recipe is a nutritional reference for pets with health conditions and does not constitute a medical treatment plan. Please consult your veterinarian before making dietary changes to confirm the plan is appropriate for your pet.

fail.protein_low: Protein below minimum guideline — monitor muscle mass

risk.lowFatNotForPuppies: This recipe is low in fat — not suitable for puppies (puppies need ≥21g fat/1000kcal)
risk.highFatForSedentaryDog: Fat contributes >40% of calories — suitable for active dogs; for sedentary indoor dogs, consider replacing part of the duck with chicken breast or turkey breast
risk.consultVet: Pets with chronic conditions should have regular vet check-ups to monitor nutritional markers
risk.organModeration: Organ meat max 2×/week — excess Vitamin A can accumulate to toxic levels
risk.longTermPremix: For long-term sole feeding, add a dog/cat multivitamin & mineral supplement (zinc, copper, iodine, etc.)

note.liver: Rich in Vitamin A, B12 & iron · Limit to 10% of total food per serving
note.gizzard: Low fat, high protein · Rich in zinc & selenium, aids digestion
note.heart: Natural taurine source · Contains CoQ10 for heart health
note.salmon: High Omega-3 (EPA+DHA) · Anti-inflammatory, improves coat shine
note.mackerel: One of the richest fish in Omega-3 · High Vitamin D
note.sardines: Natural calcium & phosphorus · Choose unsalted, caution for kidney disease
note.beef: High zinc & iron · Rich in taurine, supports muscle maintenance
note.lamb: Low-allergen protein · Good choice for food-sensitive pets
note.rabbit: Very low fat · Lean protein, ideal for weight management
note.egg: Complete amino acid profile · High bioavailability, must be fully cooked
note.pumpkin: Soluble dietary fiber · Relieves constipation or diarrhea
note.broccoli: Rich in Vitamin C & K · Antioxidant, supports immunity
note.carrot: Beta-carotene source · Supports vision and skin health
note.blueberry: Anthocyanin antioxidant · Low calorie, use as a small addition
note.sweet_potato: Dietary fiber & Vitamin A · Limit for diabetic pets
note.spinach: High oxalic acid · Avoid for kidney disease or urinary issues
note.green_peas: Plant protein boost · Limit for pets with kidney conditions
